prompt:

The sociodemographic characteristics will be delimited with triple backsticks, the question will be delimited with the following symbols < >, and the response alternatives by [ ]. Characteristics of the person: ``` 40 year old woman. She lives in METROPOLITANA region in Chile, in an urban area. Her socioeconomic level is gse C3 and her level of schooling is high school incomplete. She does not belong to any indigenous people. She does not feel close to any religion. Regarding politics, on the left-right scale she feels closer to the right, she does not sympathize or feel close to any party, she  is not at all interested in politics.  ```. Question: < What is this person's opinion on abortion?>. Alternatives: [ Abortion should always be prohibited, abortion should only be allowed in special cases, abortion should be an option for women in any case. ].
